heading: Auto-Scale Cluster Tier and Storage Capacity
body:
Atlas cluster tier reactive auto-scaling is available for all dedicated
cluster tiers under the General
and the Low-CPU cluster classes.

For new clusters, Atlas automatically enables cluster tier
auto-scaling and storage auto-scaling.

Use **Auto-scale** options to configure your cluster to
automatically scale your cluster tier, storage capacity, or both in
response to cluster usage.

> **Important:** During a migration, if you restore a snapshot with a larger size
> than the storage capacity of the destination cluster, the cluster
> does not automatically scale.

You can [opt out](opt-out-autoscaling) of cluster tier and
storage auto-scaling. To learn more, see
[Cluster tier scaling](howitworks-scale-cluster-tier) and
[storage auto-scaling](howitworks-scale-cluster-storage).

> **See Also:** 
>
> - [Cluster Auto-Scaling](cluster-autoscaling)
>
> - [Connection Limits and Cluster Tier](connection-limits)
